suite.name: LinkableServiceWAServices

test.name: Stability_TC_01_Mobile validate Linkable service FishCatchWA

kw.arg: *************************************** User to Linkable service FishCatchWA from

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Given first row column header name 'TestcaseID' not exists in the following xls/xlsx file '${File Name}'
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Returns content of a column from the current sheet of the document.

kw.doc: Returns the index of the first occurrence of the ``value`` on the list.

kw.name: Convert To Upper Case
kw.doc: Converts string to upper case.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.msg: &{Appium Config Dict} = { Device_Name=iPhone 15 Pro | Device_Type=Mobile | Device_OS=iOS | OS_version=17 | Appium_port=0000 | Cloud_Device_Type=None | Platform=BroswerStack }
kw.doc: keyword wrapper to convert the two list into dictionary

kw.name: Close Current Excel Document
kw.doc: Closes current document.

kw.msg: &{App Config} = { Device_Name=iPhone 15 Pro | Device_Type=Mobile | Device_OS=iOS | OS_version=17 | Appium_port=0000 | Cloud_Device_Type=None | Platform=BroswerStack }
kw.doc: Load The Appium Server Config Data From an Excel(.xls) File

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Open Application
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.msg: Multiple keywords with name 'Capture Page Screenshot' found. Give the full name of the keyword you want to use: AppiumLibrary.Capture Page Screenshot SeleniumLibrary.Capture Page Screenshot

WebDriverException: Message: App Automate testing time has expired. Contact BrowserStack Support at https://www.browserstack.com/contact for extending your Free Trial.
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.1/cli/args/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | no | alias | | strict_ssl | No | allows you to send commands to an invalid certificate host like a self-signed one. |
kw.status: WebDriverException: Message: App Automate testing time has expired. Contact BrowserStack Support at https://www.browserstack.com/contact for extending your Free Trial.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
